name: Pumpkin-Apple Pie-gnfk05b
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine brown sugar, cornstarch, 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon and 1/4 teaspoon salt.
2. Stir in water and butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture comes to a boil.
3. Carefully add apple slices and cook for another 4 minutes. Remove from heat and set aside.
4. In a bowl, combine egg, granulated sugar, pumpkin, 1/4 teaspoon salt, cinnamon, ginger, clove, and evaporated milk.
5. Beat until well blended using a rotary or electric mixer on low speed.
6. Pour the apple mixture into the unbaked pie shell.
7. Spoon an even layer of the pumpkin mixture over the apple mixture.
8. Bake in a preheated 425°F oven for 10 minutes.
9. Reduce oven temperature to 375°F and bake another 40 minutes or until filling is set around edges.
10. Cool on a wire rack.
